notes: Repo-local P4 Debug memory. verifiedFix is written only when a follow-up verification artifact exists.

entries.rootCause: Generated HTML omitted the thin command surface, which made reachability proof depend on browser animation timing instead of the same update/render path.
entries.evidence: P4 threshold seed occurrence 1/3. Seeded for Generalizer demo; activation remains HITL-only.

verifiedFix.summary: Require window.__afStep(input, dt), validate it statically, and verify the generated run with the reachability proof.
